China is the leading global producer of aluminum sulfate, with comprehensive industrial data from recent Chinese mining and chemical industrial reports and USGS 2023 data.
The US has well-documented production from chemical manufacturers and mining companies, supported by the USGS Mineral Commodity Summaries 2023.
India is a significant producer due to its large chemical industry, with data from Indian mining and chemical sector reports indicating stable production volumes.
Russia's production is backed by national industrial output reports, though exact figures vary; moderate confidence due to limited international transparency.
Japan produces aluminum sulfate primarily for industrial uses; data derives from national chemical production statistics but production volumes vary year to year.

The US has extensive calcium carbonate mining operations; USGS 2023 data provides solid, up-to-date statistics.
China is the largest producer of calcium carbonate globally with robust mining and processing industries; data from USGS 2023 and Chinese mining reports; very reliable.
India is a major limestone and calcium carbonate producer; consistent production supported by Ministry of Mines India and industry reports.

Germany has stable production reported in recent European mining reviews 2022-2023.
